products.title: Zack's Pyramid Minnow

images_info.alt: Zack's Pyramid Minnow - Flies - Fly Fish Food
Zack's Pyramid Minnow - Flies - Fly Fish Food

products.body_html: Size 6 A must have for those going to Pyramid Lake, or any stillwater where baitfish are prevelant. This suggestive pattern is not just a staple for trout, it has also proven to be extremely effective on our local bass.

products.title: Humungus - Barbless

images_info.alt: Humungus - Barbless - Flies - Fly Fish Food

products.body_html: A scaled down barbless Mini Streamer, perfect when the imitative approach doesn't work. Fished in conjunction with standard wet flies on either the point or top dropper they bring life to a cast of flies whilst maintaining stealth with their much smaller size

products.title: Humungus Black & Gold

images_info.alt: Humungus Black & Gold - Flies - Fly Fish Food

products.body_html: The Humungus is probably the most well known modern lure for Trout in the UK. It is highly effective and available in a number of guises for all fishing situations, both small stillwaters and reservoirs on any line or retrieve for Rainbows and Browns

products.title: Balanced Leather Leech Nano - Black/Chartreuse

images_info.alt: Balanced Leather Leech Nano - Black/Chartreuse - Flies - Fly Fish Food

products.body_html: "To keep up with the growing popularity of stillwater fishing, I have expanded the BLL series with a scaled down, Nano option. As the fish in certain lakes have become more wary, the Nano version will keep you productive and the quality Tiemco hook will handle those large trout we are all in pursuit of. The colorways in the series have expanded to include ~ Black/Red & Olive." - Signature Tyer Matt Winkler
